Stewart Platform Ping Pong Concept

A visually interesting concept that can showcase mechanism thinking and system design.

PersonalBuildPrototype
Back Home

Overview

This project is useful because it communicates engineering curiosity. It can highlight mechanism layout, control ideas, and the challenge of balancing responsiveness, motion range, and stability.
